title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos has the most total views on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID / Ready to Rock (Official Teaser Video)  TVアニメ「ロックは淑女の嗜みでして」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 58,054 | Yesterday: 10
BAND-MAID / Present Perfect (Official Teaser Video AKANE) — Views: 57,075 | Yesterday: 58
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  KANAMI vs Dany — Views: 51,420 | Yesterday: 24
